title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 06 2025
summary:
Main
The most-traded iron ore futures contract stabilized and strengthened today, holding up well throughout the session. The most-traded contractI2601 closed at 777.5 yuan/mt, up 0.65% from the previous trading day. Market trading ac vity was moderate, with traders largely selling in line with market condi ons.
